title: zuckertia manuelii
intro: Zuckertia manuelii, also known as the "Mexican Prickly Poppy," is a plant species native to Mexico, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and hairy, prickly stems. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Zuckertia manuelii include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies for its analgesic and antiseptic properties.
